title: Minecraft: Trailer Style
description: Experience Minecraft like you see in the official trailers
body:
# A Modpack with  Minecraft Trailer style

![Minecraft: Trailer Style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g2JXbXuJ/images/ed5e320f7a9546e2e834f474d788c86be821ad58.png)
This modpack adds many visual effects mods to improve the quality of gameplay and change the game style from Vanilla to Trailer.

### Trailer-style Minecraft
![:D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g2JXbXuJ/images/ef43c0e5ee08ddc24b81625688da963f48ad95b6.png)
![:3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g2JXbXuJ/images/116388d7fb2ab9d09998ad7575a340eaae587d4f.png)
![<3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g2JXbXuJ/images/563e0222c55b1a05801898149f5376f7fc8b5c23.png)
### IT'S ABOUT TIME!
